finding_results.notes: Replaced meeting-minutes summary with pressure-active clause dialogue so each speaker carries distinct rhythm and diction: Priya is boundary-plainspoken and directive, Ravi stays procedural/bargaining with stress-fragment pivots, and Anika remains concrete and immediate. High-pressure turns now default to contractions and colloquial texture; formal register is retained as intentional contrast in the legal/commitment language.
finding_results.summary: Clause-four-through-signature exchange now separates Priya/Ravi/Anika idiolects and removes transcript-like procedural drift while preserving intentional legal contrast.
